text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The results last time could've been better, but
this time will be different!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I promise I'll repay all of the hard work you've put
in, so be sure to watch me run today, okay?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'll make sure to put a huge smile on your face.
choice_data_list: I'll be waiting for you at the finish line!
I'll be waiting for you at the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Right! I'll be back in no time! Be sure to greet me
with your sparkling smile! ♪
